error_signature: blank screen on Wix after embedding Typebot
title: Blank screen issue when embedding Typebot in Wix
symptom: After embedding the Typebot code into a Wix website, a blank screen appears instead of the chatbot interface.
not_this_if: Typebot works correctly without n8n integration
root_cause: The Webhook node in n8n is configured to respond immediately, which prevents the necessary response from being sent back to Typebot. This misconfiguration leads to the blank screen issue on the Wix site.
fix_steps: Open the Webhook node settings in n8n
Change the 'Respond' setting from 'Immediately' to 'Using Respond to Webhook Node'
Add a Respond to Webhook node at the end of your workflow
Save the workflow and test the integration again
agent_instruction: Reconfigure the Webhook node to respond correctly to Typebot.
